jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Zydus Lifesciences
jsonLd.description:
Zydus Lifesciences has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zydus Lifesciences:
Zydus Lifesciences is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences!
